title: SKILL.md Frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter block in SKILL.md files.

name.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for the skill.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what the skill does and when to invoke it.

category.description: Top-level category the skill belongs to.

chainable.description: Whether the orchestrator may chain this skill with others in a single turn.

invokes.description: Skills this skill may call downstream.

invoked_by.description: Skills or actors that call this skill.

tools.description: Comma-separated list of tools the skill is allowed to use (e.g. "Read, Glob, Grep").

inputs.description: Named context inputs the skill expects.

outputs.description: Named context outputs the skill produces.

model.description: Preferred model tier for running the skill.

type.description: Optional qualifier for the skill kind (e.g. "reference" for policy/lookup skills).
